description_long: This electric fan features a sleek, modern design with three wide, gently curved blades made of a dark wood-like material. The central hub and mounting rod are metallic, with a smooth, cylindrical form and a slightly wider cap at the top, giving it a streamlined appearance. The blades are evenly spaced and attached securely to the central hub, ensuring balanced rotation. There is no visible blade guard, leaving the blades exposed for maximum airflow. The fan is designed to be mounted on the ceiling, with a sturdy rod connecting the hub to the ceiling cap. No power cord or control panel is visible, suggesting integrated or remote operation.
description: A modern ceiling-mounted electric fan with three dark wooden blades and a metallic central hub, featuring a sleek, exposed design without a blade guard.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the fan from a slightly angled side, highlighting the curvature and width of the blades and the metallic central hub.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a perspective where all three blades are clearly visible, emphasizing their even spacing and the fan's symmetrical design.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the fan from another side angle, showing the gentle curve of the blades and the smooth, cylindrical mounting rod.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a view that accentuates the length of the blades and the exposed, open design without a blade guard.
attribute_blade_guard_design: There is no blade guard present; the blades are fully exposed, emphasizing an open and minimalist design.
